note: Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/Metric.lean:206 -- noncomputable def dist (u v : V) : ℕ, the ℕ-valued length of a shortest walk between u and v in a SimpleGraph (0 if disconnected); this IS the graph-distance concept (edist alongside it is the ℕ∞-valued version).
verify_note: decl confirmed at Metric.lean:206 (noncomputable def dist (u v : V) : ℕ := (G.edist u v).toNat, docstring 'length of the shortest walk'); Wikidata Q2742711 label 'graph distance' desc 'minimum number of edges in a path connecting two vertices' matches exactly -- exact match_kind is honest.
